title: AI Powered Software QA Engineer
description:
**We build at AI speed. Quality has to move just as fast.** 




 At Pisteyo we design and ship applications and platforms faster than traditional teams can. That pace only holds if quality keeps up with it. This role is the answer. Not a seat on a large QA team, but the single point of confidence that what reaches our clients works, looks right, and stays reliable as it grows.
 



  





**What you will own** 




 Five layers. One owner.
 



 You cover the whole quality story, from the first click to the production deploy.
 



  





**UI testing** 




 Verify that interfaces render, respond, and behave correctly across browsers, devices, and screen sizes. Build automated visual and functional checks that catch layout breaks, broken states, and inconsistencies before users do.
 



**UX testing** 




 Go past "does it work" to "does it work well." Evaluate flows, friction, accessibility, and clarity. Flag where users will hesitate, get lost, or drop off, and turn those observations into specific, actionable fixes.
 



**Code testing** 




 Read code, write tests, and validate logic. Build and maintain unit, integration, and API suites. Use AI to generate coverage, surface edge cases, and review changes at the same speed the team delivers them.
 



**Infrastructure testing** 




 Test what holds the product up. Validate deployments, environments, configurations, and pipelines. Run load, performance, and resilience checks so infrastructure behaves under real conditions, not just on paper.
 



**Regression testing** 




 Make sure new work never breaks old work. Maintain automated regression suites that run continuously and keep release confidence high without slowing the team down.
 



**The green light** 




 Be the trusted signal for every release. When you say it is ready, the team ships with confidence. You own that judgment and the evidence behind it.
 



 How you will workAI\\-first. Automation by default.AI is your default tool, not an occasional one
 



 Use AI to generate test cases, write and refactor test code, analyze failures, summarize results, and expand coverage faster than any manual process allows.
 



  





**Automate first, repeat never** 




 If a check runs more than once, it should run on its own. Build pipelines that test continuously, trigger on every change, and report clearly.
 



  





**Own the full picture** 




 You see the whole product and the whole quality story, not a slice of it. Scope it, prioritize it, and run it without waiting to be told what to test.
 



**Make quality visible** 




 Translate test results into clear signals that engineers and leadership can act on. Quality should be something the whole team can see, not a black box.
 



  





**What we are looking f** 
 or
 


* Real testing experience across more than one layer: functional, automation, API, performance, or similar.
* Strong automation skills with frameworks such as Playwright, Cypress, Selenium, Pytest, or Jest.
* Comfort reading and writing code in JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, or an equivalent.
* Fluent, hands\\-on use of AI tools for testing and development. You already work this way, or you are clearly hungry to.
* Working knowledge of CI/CD pipelines such as GitHub Actions and of cloud environments.
* An eye for UX, not just for bugs.
* Independence. You can scope, prioritize, and run quality on your own.
* Clear written communication with US and India based stakeholders.



**Bonus points** 



* Experience with AI\\-assisted or AI\\-native testing tools.
* Performance and load testing experience at scale.
* Exposure to infrastructure as code, Docker, or Kubernetes.
* A track record testing complex platforms or B2B applications.
* A builder's instinct. You make your own tools when none exist.
* Comfort working night\\-shift overlap with US teams when needed.

Join us on this exciting journey towards excellence in software development.

title: Staff Software Development Engineer
description:
**About Zscaler**
 Zscaler accelerates digital transformation to ensure our customers can be more agile, efficient, resilient, and secure. As an
 **AI\\-forward enterprise** 
 , we are constantly pushing the envelope, leveraging the world’s largest security data lake to power our cloud\\-native Zero Trust Exchange platform. This innovation protects our customers from cyberattacks and data loss by securely connecting users, devices, and applications in any location.
   

  

 Here,
 **impact in your role matters more than title** 
 and trust is built on results. We say, impact over activity. We seek innovators who actively use AI to amplify their impact and who thrive in an environment where we leverage intelligent systems to stay ahead of evolving threats. We believe in transparency and value
 **constructive, honest debate** 
 —we’re focused on getting to the best ideas, faster. We build high\\-performing teams that can make an impact quickly and with high quality. To do this, we are building a culture of execution centered on
 **customer obsession** 
 , collaboration, ownership, and accountability.
   

  

 We value high\\-impact, high\\-accountability with a sense of urgency where you’re enabled to do your best work and embrace your potential. If you’re driven by purpose, thrive on solving complex challenges, and want to be part of the team that’s helping to secure the AI age, we invite you to bring your talents to Zscaler and help shape the future of cybersecurity.
   

  

**Role**
 We are seeking a talented, high\\-energy, Senior Software Development Engineer to join us as part of our Cellular innovation journey. This is a hybrid role based in Zscaler office location in Hyderabad, reporting to the Director, Software Engineering in the Emerging Tech Department. As part of our innovative team, you will play a critical role in the development and enhancement of our cutting\\-edge cloud security solutions for the Cellular ecosystem. This is a green field opportunity to define and build a new class of market defining products.
   

  

**What You’ll Do (Role Expectations)**
* Applying object\\-oriented programming principles using Java, Python, Go, or C\\+\\+ to design, develop, and maintain highly scalable, cloud\\-based enterprise applications in collaboration with Datapath, UI, and UX engineers.
* Leveraging your experience with streaming platforms, big data analytics, and dashboard visualization.
* Helping define specifications and identify platform infrastructure required for high\\-speed traffic processing at the edge.
* Demonstrating strong problem\\-solving skills and the ability to analyze complex technical issues.
* Exhibiting excellent verbal and written communication skills, effectively collaborating with team members and stakeholders, and being detail\\-oriented, highly organized, and adept at managing multiple priorities to completion.


**Who You Are (Success Profile)**
* You're comfortable building the path as you walk it. You thrive in a dynamic environment, seeing ambiguity not as a hindrance, but as the raw material to build something meaningful.
* Your passion for the mission fuels your bias for action. You operate with integrity because you genuinely care about the outcome. You adapt to what’s needed, navigating seamlessly between high\\-level strategy and hands\\-on execution.
* You build deep empathy for the customer—both internal and external—and anchor your decisions in solving their real\\-world problems. You champion their needs from start to finish, knowing their success is our success.
* You have a deep curiosity for how things work and are energized by solving complex technical challenges. You believe in the power of technology to accelerate transformation and are always looking for a better, more secure, and scalable way.
* You are skilled at distilling complex problems, user needs, and technical concepts into clear, simple, and actionable plans. You are a precise communicator who brings clarity and focus to every interaction.


**What We’re Looking For (Minimum Qualifications)**
* Passionate software developer with 5\\+ years of hands\\-on application development experience and a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field.
* Proficient in Java, Python, and Go, with expertise in designing and implementing microservices, developing in\\-house APIs, and defining distributed architectures to address challenges such as configuration distribution, cache invalidation, and system\\-wide consistency.
* Extensive hands\\-on experience with real\\-time analytics using pub/sub platforms (e.g., Kafka, Pub/Sub, Pulsar), distributed datastores (Elasticsearch), and building optimized big data pipelines with Spark or Beam.
* Solid understanding of cloud technologies, including virtualization, containerization, and microservices, as well as security principles and protocols such as SSL/TLS, IPsec, and OAuth.
* Strong background in software development focused on network protocols, distributed systems, and cloud technologies.


**What Will Make You Stand Out (Preferred Qualifications)**
* Prior experience in the cybersecurity industry or with cloud security solutions, and a background in designing and implementing enterprise\\-grade security or networking products.
* In\\-depth knowledge of cellular architecture, protocols, and standards, along with a strong understanding of TCP/IP, high performance computing, event\\-based programming, and fault tolerance.
* Experience working with cloud platforms based on Kubernetes and major providers such as AWS, Azure, or GCP.


 At Zscaler, we are committed to building a team that reflects the communities we serve and the customers we work with. We foster an inclusive environment that values all backgrounds and perspectives, emphasizing collaboration and belonging. Join us in our mission to make doing business seamless and secure.
   

  

**Benefits**
 Our Benefits program is one of the most important ways we support our employees. Zscaler proudly offers comprehensive and inclusive benefits to meet the diverse needs of our employees and their families throughout their life stages, including:
   

  

* Various health plans
* Time off plans for vacation and sick time
* Parental leave options
* Retirement options
* Education reimbursement
* In\\-office perks, and more!


 Learn more about Zscaler’s Future of Work strategy, hybrid working model, and benefits here.
   

  

 By applying for this role, you adhere to applicable laws, regulations, and Zscaler policies, including those related to security and privacy standards and guidelines.
   

  

 Zscaler is committed to providing equal employment opportunities to all individuals. We strive to create a workplace where employees are treated with respect and have the chance to succeed. All qualified applicants will be considered for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex (including pregnancy or related medical conditions), age, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, genetic information, disability status, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state, or local laws.
 *See more information by clicking on the* 
*Know Your Rights: Workplace Discrimination is Illegal* 
*link.*
 Pay Transparency
   

  

 Zscaler complies with all applicable federal, state, and local pay transparency rules.
   

  

 Zscaler is committed to providing reasonable support (called accommodations or adjustments) in our recruiting processes for candidates who are differently abled, have long term conditions, mental health conditions or sincerely held religious beliefs, or who are neurodivergent or require pregnancy\\-related support.

description:
**Job Description**
**Title:** 
 Developer \\- Shotscope™ (.NET Full Stack) \\- Husky(Guindy, Chennai)
   

  

**Id:** 
 20959
   

  

**Type:** 
 FullTime
   

  

**Location:** 
 Chennai, India
   

  

 At Husky TechnologiesTM, our success is based on your success. Our ability to keep our customers in the lead is based on building the strongest team possible.
   

  

 Husky TechnologiesTM has a strong foundation built on innovation, close customer relationships and a unique culture and values. We are dedicated to offering our customers the highest quality products and services and are looking for people with the inspiration and talent to develop with us as we pursue our ambitious growth strategy. We are a leader in developing state\\-of\\-the\\-art technology and it is this technology base that uniquely positions us to serve customers who seek differentiation through solutions that provide speed, flexibility and maximum productivity. This capability is at the core of our mission and competitive strategy.
   

  

 Husky TechnologiesTM offers a wealth of opportunity for personal growth and development. Most importantly, Husky Technologies TM offers an opportunity to work with – and be challenged by – a team of great people. Our success is possible because of the creativity, intelligence and passion of our people around the world and their desire to lead change. At the same time, we are not afraid to expect a lot and strive for leadership in all of our key markets. We are a company taking on new challenges and for the right people this means exceptional career development opportunities, the chance to be part of a team that is the best in the world at what we do and the experience that comes from working in an environment that demands constant transformation and innovation.
   

  

 Husky TechnologiesTM is an exciting company with tremendous potential. We have a great team and great expectations. If you are attracted to bold goals, believe in uncompromising honesty, support mutual respect, care about environmental responsibility, have a passion for excellence and a desire to make a positive contribution – then we want you to join the Husky TechnologiesTM team!
   

  

****Job Description****
 Do you want to work an industrial grade software solution powering real time manufacturing intelligence on factory floors worldwide?
   

  

 As a Developer on our Shotscope™ team, you will help build and maintain industrial\\-grade manufacturing intelligence software used by customers worldwide. You will implement features and components on a .NET and Azure\\-based full stack, contribute clean and reliable code, and support the continuous evolution of a mission\\-critical product that connects machines, processes, and data.
   

  

 This role is ideal for a motivated engineer who enjoys hands\\-on development, learning from experienced teammates, and seeing their work deployed in real production environments—with clear opportunities to grow toward senior and lead roles.
   

  

 If you want your code to have visible impact on how factories operate, Shotscope™ is where software meets the real world.
   

  

****Responsibilities****
**Technical Implementation**
* Implement software components and features based on provided designs, specifications, and guidance.
* Contribute to the development of reliable, maintainable, and secure code within the assigned scope.
* Apply agreed coding standards, patterns, and best practices in daily development work.
* Make basic technical decisions within assigned tasks, escalating questions or uncertainties when needed.


**Delivery \\& Execution Excellence**
* Translate assigned requirements and tasks into working software.
* Complete development work in alignment with sprint goals and delivery commitments.
* Contribute to task breakdowns and effort estimates for assigned work.
* Proactively raise risks, blockers, or implementation issues to the team.


**Quality, Standards \\& Engineering Practices**
* Write clean, testable code and contribute to unit and integration tests.
* Participate in code reviews, incorporating feedback and learning from peers.
* Ensure individual contributions meet Definition of Ready (DoR) and Definition of Done (DoD) criteria.
* Follow established DevOps, security, and quality practices.


**Incident \\& Operational Support**
* Assist in troubleshooting defects and issues in development and production environments.
* Support corrective (bug fixes) and evolutive (enhancements) maintenance of existing solutions.


**Collaboration \\& Growth**
* Collaborate effectively with other developers, QA, Product Owners, and Tech Leads.
* Seeking feedback and guidance to continuously improve technical skills.
* Actively learn the systems, tools, and technologies used by the team.
* Contribute positively to team culture and shared ownership of outcomes.


****Qualifications****
* Bachelor’s degree in computer science, IT, or related field.
* 4\\+ years’ professional experience in software development.
* Proficiency in .NET technologies (C\\#, ASP.NET Core, SQL, .NET Framework, Entity Framework).
* Strong grasp of Agile methodologies, DevOps principles, application security and version control systems (e.g., Azure DevOps).
* Proficiency in modern front\\-end frameworks (e.g., preference: React; Angular).
* Clean Code Development and working experience with Unit Testing, and Test\\-driven Development.
* Familiarity with source code version control, branching strategies, CI/CD pipelines and other DevOps practices.
* Working knowledge of Agile development practices.
* Excellent communication skills and ability to work in a team.
* Fluency in English (spoken and written).
* Strong problem\\-solving skills and attention to detail.
* Ability to adjust quickly to changing assignments, and priorities.


**Assets**
* Familiarity with CI/CD and pipelines.
* Experience using AI‑assisted coding tools (e.g. GitHub Copilot) responsibly, with full accountability for code quality, security, and compliance.
* Familiarity with Microsoft Azure, with experience in leveraging key services (e.g., Azure App Services, Azure Functions).
* Exposure to Microsoft SQL Server BI stack, including SSAS (OLAP cube design), SSRS (report development), and SSIS (ETL processes and data integration).


**Why Husky?**
* Regulated Working Hours: Enjoy a structured work schedule that promotes a healthy work\\-life balance, allowing you to excel professionally while maintaining personal well\\-being.
* Visible Impact: Experience the satisfaction of seeing the direct outcomes of your work, as you contribute to projects that visibly enhance our company's technological capabilities and efficiency.
* Strategic Influence: Participate in architectural and technical reviews, contributing to the strategic direction of our cloud initiatives and making a tangible impact on our company's technological landscape.
* Empowered Involvement: Take an active role in decision\\-making processes and architectural reviews, where your expertise helps shape the future of our cloud solutions and overall business strategy.
* Valued Contributions: Be more than just a number in a large organization; at our company, every individual's input is valued and can lead to significant, tangible improvements in our operations and services.
* Impactful Role: Play a crucial part in both developing new applications and maintaining existing systems, ensuring their optimal performance and reliability.
* Cutting\\-Edge Projects: Work on innovative cloud solutions that are transforming our and our customer’s business, giving you the opportunity to be at the forefront of technological advancements.
* Supportive Community: Work in an environment that recognizes and celebrates individual achievements, fostering a sense of community and mutual respect among team members.
* Collaborative Environment: Join a global team of skilled professionals around the globe where your ideas are valued, and collaboration is encouraged to solve complex challenges and drive success.


 Husky TechnologiesTM offers a competitive compensation and benefits package and excellent opportunities for growth and advancement. We are committed to equal employment opportunity and respect, value and welcome diversity in our workplace. Husky TechnologiesTM also values being a great place to work and strives to maintain a safe workplace. Accordingly, Husky TechnologiesTM conditions all offers of employment on satisfactory completion of background checks. No agency or telephone inquiries please.
